inputs.label: Roof Length (Ridge-Eave)
inputs.businessContext: Slope length of roof from ridge to eave (in feet)

businessContext_i18n.en: Slope length of roof from ridge to eave (feet)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çatının mahyadan saçağa olan eğim boyu (feet cinsinden).
businessContext_i18n.de: Neigungslänge des Daches vom First zur Traufe (in Fuß).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de pente du toit du faîte à l'avant-toit (en pieds)
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de la pendiente del techo desde la cumbrera hasta el alero (en pies)
businessContext_i18n.ar: طول منحدر السقف من الحافة إلى الطنف (بالقدم).

inputs.label: Roof Width
inputs.businessContext: Total width of roof perpendicular to slope (in feet)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total width of roof perpendicular to slope (feet)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çatının eğime dik yöndeki toplam genişliği (feet).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtbreite des Daches senkrecht zur Neigung (in Fuß).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur totale du toit perpendiculairement à la pente (en pieds)
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho total del techo perpendicular a la pendiente (en pies)
businessContext_i18n.ar: العرض الإجمالي للسقف عموديًا على المنحدر (بالقدم).

inputs.label: Panel Coverage Width
inputs.businessContext: Coverage width of one panel (in inches). Typical for standing seam panels is 12-18 inches.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width covered by one panel (inches). Typical 12-18 inches for standing seam panels.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir panelin kapladığı genişlik (inç). Standing seam paneller için tipik 12-18 inç.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite, die ein Panel abdeckt (in Zoll). Bei Stehfalzpanelen typischerweise 12-18 Zoll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur couverte par un panneau (en pouces). Pour les panneaux à joint debout, typiquement 12-18 pouces.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho que cubre un panel (pulgadas). Típicamente 12-18 pulgadas para paneles de junta alzada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العرض الذي يغطيه لوح واحد (بالبوصة). للألواح ذات التماس الواقف، عادة 12-18 بوصة.

businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de saliente en el alero (pulgadas)

inputs.label: Clip Spacing
inputs.businessContext: Center-to-center spacing of clips along each panel seam (in inches). Typical 12-24 inches.

businessContext_i18n.en: Center-to-center spacing of clips along each panel seam (inches). Typical 12-24 inches.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir panel dikişi boyunca klipslerin merkezden merkeze aralığı (inç). Tipik 12-24 inç.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mittenabstand der Klipse entlang jeder Paneelnaht (in Zoll). Typischerweise 12-24 Zoll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance centre à centre des clips le long de chaque joint de panneau (en pouces). Typiquement 12-24 pouces.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia centro a centro entre clips a lo largo de cada junta del panel (pulgadas). Típicamente 12-24 pulgadas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة من مركز إلى مركز بين المشابك على طول خط التماس لكل لوح (بالبوصة). عادة 12-24 بوصة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Roof length must be at least 1 ft.
Roof width must be at least 1 ft.
Panel coverage must be between 12 and 18 inches.
Clip spacing must be between 12 and 24 inches.
